mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_module_details (role_id, module_detail_id, created_by, created) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{moduleDetailId}, #{createdBy}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (role_id, module_detail_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO role_module_details (role_id, module_detail_id, created_by, created) VALUES
(#{roleId}, #{moduleDetailId}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (role_id, module_detail_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM user_groups WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET permission_version = permission_version + 1, modified = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
